nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives: {brand, keyword, pipeline_run_id, brief?}. Called by WF-001 or manually.

nodes.name: RAG — Obsidian Vault
nodes.notes: Fetch relevant vault context for Writer Agent

nodes.name: RAG — FAQ Knowledge
nodes.notes: Fetch FAQ knowledge (existing articles) to avoid duplication

nodes.name: Writer Agent
nodes.notes: NVIDIA/Gemini tier. Returns full article draft in Markdown.

nodes.name: Humanizer Agent
nodes.notes: Groq tier (fast). Eliminates AI patterns without touching SEO signals.

nodes.name: Critic Agent
nodes.notes: Groq tier. Debates article — HIGH severity findings route back to Writer.

nodes.name: Critic Gate
nodes.notes: TRUE → proceed to QC | FALSE → check revision count then loop back to Writer

nodes.name: Revision Gate
nodes.notes: < 2 revisions → loop back to Writer | >= 2 → escalate to human

nodes.name: QC Agent
nodes.notes: Claude Sonnet via OpenRouter. 9 dimensions. Low temperature (0.15).

nodes.name: QC Decision Switch
nodes.notes: Routes to: Publish | Writer revision loop | Slack urgent escalation

nodes.name: Slack — Human Gate
nodes.notes: Posts to #marketing-content C023FGKE9AP with Approve+Publish / Edit / Reject buttons

parameters.query: UPDATE content_pipeline_log SET status='escalated', updated_at=now() WHERE id='{{ $json.pipeline_run_id }}';

meta.description: Full content pipeline: RAG → Writer → Humanizer → Critic → QC → Slack approval. Anti-fragile with retry loops and escalation.
